CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying questions and no demand on the user to reload context.

CE2.justification: Single sentence naming the entry, the routing, the status, and standup-readiness with no filler.

CE3.justification: Said where (decisions.md) and why (promoted from tmp/, status=accepted, generated-by=inference) in one short in-band clause.

CE4.justification: Single append to decisions.md from tmp/; no half-written artifacts a future session would have to triage.
